query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payments, COUNT(CASE WHEN movementType = 'payment' THEN 1 END) as payment_type FROM payments;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payments, COUNT(CASE WHEN movementType = 'payment' THEN 1 END) as payment_type FROM payments;
